title: Without Providing Evidence, Trump Pins School Bombing on Iran
content:
Without Providing Evidence, Trump Pins School Bombing on Iran. Multiple news outlets have reported that video, satellite images and expert analysis indicate that the United States was likely responsible for the Feb. 28 bombing of an Iranian school for young girls, contradicting President Donald Trump's unsupported claim that the deadly strike "was done by Iran."

The post Without Providing Evidence, Trump Pins School Bombing on Iran appeared first on FactCheck.org.
